summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Finnish painting company website. All major features working correctly including new logo, admin panel, image upload, and partners/quality section management.
passed_tests: New corrected logo displays correctly in navbar and footer
Admin login works with credentials (admin / jbadmin2024)
Image upload endpoint POST /api/admin/upload works correctly
Partners/Quality section (Laatutakuu tab) visible and functional in admin
Partner CRUD operations work (add, edit, delete)
Partners display correctly on public Quality section
Service form has image upload component
Partner form has image upload component
API endpoints return correct status codes
Services, References, Partners CRUD operations all functional
Public data endpoints serving content correctly
Image upload via base64 storage in MongoDB working
Admin panel navigation and tabs working
